subject: fix(review): address second-round code review findings
body:
- Fix handleMobileTabChange recreating on every drag frame by removing
  sheetHeight from deps (BottomSheet effect handles 0→SNAP_HALF)
- Move keyboardRef declaration above handleCanvasTouchEnd that uses it
- Remove conflicting aria-label from role="presentation" backdrop
- Add Escape key handler to close mobile overflow menu
- Remove unnecessary state.exportFormat from tabContent useMemo deps

Tags: mobile, performance, a11y
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-redesign
